data.title: Bitnomial’s Physically-Settled XRP/USD Futures Now Available for Trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Cryptocurrency derivatives trading platform Bitnomial announced on the X platform that it has officially launched XRP futures regulated by the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). Physically settled XRP/USD futures are now available for trading on the platform.

data.title: Coinbase Adds Freysa (FAI) to its Listing Roadmap
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase announced that it will add Freysa (FAI) to its coin listing roadmap.

data.title: Coinbase International will launch AKT, ZEC and WELL perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase International Station announced on the X platform that it will add support for Akash Network, Zcash and Moonwell perpetual contracts on Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced. The AKT-PERP, ZEC-PERP and WELL-PERP markets will be open on or after 9:30 am (UTC) on March 27, 2025.

data.title: BitCare Forum: Bull Bitcoin’s CEO to speak at the conference
data.description:
At Bitcare Forum 2025, Francis Pouliot will deliver his first-ever speech in Italian on Bitcoin as a tool for financial freedom..
source: https://atlas21.com/bitcare-forum-bull-bitcoins-ceo-to-speak-at-the-conference/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bitcare-forum-bull-bitcoins-ceo-to-speak-at-the-conference

data.title: Strategy’s Dream Hangs On A 23% Tightrope—Can It Stick?
data.description:
Strategy’s activities attract eyeballs whenever there’s movement in Bitcoin (BTC) price, for good reason. Bitcoin price rocketed to $108,786 on January 20, 2025, as Donald Trump stepped back into the White House. Champagne pops at Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin-obsessed firm, with a comfy 73% cushion above its $62,691 cost basis.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/20/strategys-dream-hangs-on-a-23-tightrope-can-it-stick/

data.title: Greeks.live: Option traders focus on volatility risk premium and hedging strategies. Currently, market views are quite divided.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released a Chinese community briefing, which pointed out that the market is currently divided. Some investors are concerned about the trend of whales starting to short BTC, while others are still optimistic about the long-term trend, and even some radical views predict that Bitcoin may rise to $444,000. Discussions focus more on risk management and strategy adjustments, and option traders focus on volatility risk premium and hedging strategies. Many traders discussed the margin model and funding rate of exchange options and perpetual contracts, and believed that exchanges such as Binance assumed a 0.01% lending rate baseline when calculating funding rates.
The English community briefing mentioned that some traders expect prices to fall after the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting of the Federal Reserve, while others believe that the market may rise briefly before a sustained volatile market. Traders are closely watching the important level of $83-85K, while also paying attention to the impact of the upcoming Trump meeting and potential Saylor fixed-amount purchases.

data.title: Canary Files Form S-1 for PENGU ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: Canary submitted an S-1 form to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to apply for the PENGU ETF. (Solidintel)

data.title: PENGU briefly broke through 0.0075 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 10.02%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OKX market data shows that PENGU briefly broke through 0.0075 USDT and is currently trading at 0.007181 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 10.02%.

data.title: Canary Files Application for PENGU ETF with SEC
data.description: According to Odaily, market reports indicate that Canary has submitted an S-1 form to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for the PENGU ETF.

data.title: White House Denies Trump-Canada PM Conversation Amid Tariff Concerns
data.description: According to BlockBeats, White House Press Secretary Levitt stated that there is no belief that U.S. President Donald Trump has engaged in talks with Canadian Prime Minister Carney. The situation involves the potential imposition of high tariffs.
